info.title: gollm-qa control plane
info.description: HTTP API consumed by the Cohort panel (VoterBloc/cohort). Engine is stateless — it accepts run requests, executes synchronously, and streams events back as Server-Sent Events. The panel owns all persistence.

get.description: Returns .yaml files under the apps/ directory.
Returns .yaml files under the campaigns/ directory.
Returns top-level entries under personas/. Subdirectories are returned as kind=collection with a count of .yaml files inside; loose .yaml files are returned as kind=file.

post.summary: Execute a run synchronously, streaming events as SSE
post.description:
Validates inputs (4xx if config_name/persona_set don't resolve, if both forms of either pair are set, or if inline content fails parsing/validation), then sets `Content-Type: text/event-stream` and streams events as the run executes. Each `data:` line is a JSON-encoded RunEvent. The connection lifetime is the run lifetime; the engine forgets the run when the response closes. The panel is expected to persist events as they arrive.

Event kinds (the `event.kind` field):
- `run_start` (orchestrator) — payload: `{config, agents, sources}` where `config` is the AppConfig's display name, `agents` is the number of personas being run, and `sources` is `{config: "name"|"inline", personas: "name"|"inline"}` reflecting how each input was supplied.
- `session_start` (per agent) — payload: null
- `step` (per agent) — payload: `Action[]` (actions taken during this step)
- `observation` (per agent) — payload: `UXNote`
- `error` (per agent) — payload: `AgentError`
- `session_end` (per agent) — payload: full `Session`
- `run_end` (orchestrator) — sent once at the end
- `run_error` (orchestrator) — fatal run-level error (introspection failure, etc.)

Per-agent events carry a non-empty `persona` field; orchestrator events leave it empty.

200.description: Run accepted; events stream over SSE until completion.

schema.description: Server-Sent Events stream. Each `data:` line is a JSON-encoded RunEvent.

400.description: Invalid body; missing required pair (no config_name and no config, or no persona_set and no personas); both forms set for either pair (mutually exclusive); unknown config_name; unknown persona_set; empty inline personas array; inline config fails validation; unknown model spec (the response body lists the registered provider prefixes).

name.description: File stem (no extension). Used for display.

file.description: Set when kind=file; full file name including extension.

count.description: Set when kind=collection; number of .yaml files in the collection.

RunRequest.description: Each input has two ways to arrive at the engine: by name (lookup against the engine's configured directories) or inline (parsed YAML content carried in the request). Validation requires exactly one of `config_name` / `config` and exactly one of `persona_set` / `personas`. Mixing is allowed (e.g. inline config + named persona set).

config_name.description: Stem of an entry under apps/ (no extension). Mutually exclusive with `config`.

config.description: Inline app config — same shape as the YAML on disk. Mutually exclusive with `config_name`. **Keys are snake_case** (e.g. `base_url`, `tools_from_schema`, `default_model`) because the underlying struct uses YAML tags and `yaml.Unmarshal` is what parses the inline JSON. The engine validates the same way as on-disk loads (required: `name`, `base_url`; `auth.query` and `auth.token_path` required if `auth.type` is set; per-tool `name` and `query` when `tools` is non-empty). `default_model` is optional and overrideable per request via the top-level `model` field.

persona_set.description: Name of a collection (subdirectory) under personas/. Mutually exclusive with `personas`.

personas.description: Inline personas — array of objects, each in the same shape as a persona YAML on disk. Must be non-empty. Mutually exclusive with `persona_set`.

max_steps.description: Per-agent cap on tool-call rounds. Optional; defaults to 50, hard ceiling 200.

model.description: `<provider>:<model>` spec selecting which LLM drives this run. Optional; falls back to the inline/named config's `default_model`, then to the engine's built-in default. Unknown prefix → 400 with the registered providers listed.

budget_per_agent_usd.description: Soft USD ceiling per agent. When the running estimate crosses this value mid-loop, the agent gets one wrap-up turn and exits with `stop_reason: "budget_exhausted"`. 0 (default) disables enforcement; estimation also requires the engine to have a pricing entry for the resolved model — unknown models log once and treat as zero, never crossing the ceiling.

RunEvent.description: One SSE event from POST /v1/runs. Each `data:` line in the response is a JSON-encoded value of this shape.

persona.description: Persona that emitted the event. Empty for run-level (orchestrator) events.

step.description: Set on per-agent events; the step within that agent's run.

payload.description: Shape varies by kind. See the createRun operation description for details.
